name: Inkblot
description: Folded-paper ink tests, every blot mirrored down its crease — redraws press out new symmetrical readings.

code.style: --rule: ( /* both halves share one emitted ink, size and blob radius; the right half is the mirror */ --blot: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color2)); --bw: @r(18, 32); --bh: @r(36, 64); --byy: @r(16, 40); --brr: @r(30%, 70%) @r(30%, 70%) @r(30%, 70%) @r(30%, 70%) / @r(30%, 70%) @r(30%, 70%) @r(30%, 70%) @r(30%, 70%); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: calc(50% - @var(--bw) * 1%); width: calc(@var(--bw) * 1%); top: calc(@var(--byy) * 1%); height: calc(@var(--bh) * 1%); border-radius: @var(--brr); background: @var(--blot); transition: ease 700ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 50%; width: calc(@var(--bw) * 1%); top: calc(@var(--byy) * 1%); height: calc(@var(--bh) * 1%); border-radius: @var(--brr); background: @var(--blot); transform: scaleX(-1); transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
